title: Drift Protocol
summary: Complete Drift Protocol SDK for building perpetual futures, spot trading, and DeFi applications on Solana.
author: raunit-dev

executionFlow.title: Quick Start

landingGuidance.title: Operational guidance
landingGuidance.content:
- Confirm network, fee, and endpoint assumptions before sending transactions or requests.
- Prefer the protocol's documented production defaults over generic Solana defaults.
- Re-fetch official docs if live behavior diverges from the embedded guide.

failureHandling.title: Error Handling
